zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Néville於大約1140年出生時，他的父親Gilbert De Neville14歲，母親JOHANNA de CLARE Lady Plicia Baroness Neville12歲。他於大約1152年與Mrs Hugh de Neville在英國林可爾史爾哈布盧結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1199年在英國林可爾史爾格利姆斯比享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh de Néville于大约1140年出生时，他的父亲Gilbert De Neville14岁，母亲JOHANNA de CLARE Lady Plicia Baroness Neville12岁。他于大约1152年与Mrs Hugh de Neville在英国林可爾史爾哈布盧结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1199年在英国林可爾史爾格利姆斯比享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Néville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Néville was born about 1140, his father, Gilbert De Neville, was 14 and his mother, JOHANNA de CLARE Lady Plicia Baroness Neville, was 12. He married Mrs Hugh de Neville about 1152, in Habrough, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1199, in Grimsby, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Néville est né environ 1140, son père, Gilbert De Neville, avait 14 ans et sa mère, JOHANNA de CLARE Lady Plicia Baroness Neville, avait 12 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Hugh de Neville environ 1152, à Habrough, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1199, à Grimsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh de Néville um 1140 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilbert De Neville 14 und seine Mutter JOHANNA de CLARE Lady Plicia Baroness Neville 12. Er hat um 1152 in Habrough, Lincolnshire, England Mrs Hugh de Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1199 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Grimsby, Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Néville è nato il circa 1140, il suo padre, Gilbert De Neville, aveva 14 anni e il suo madre, JOHANNA de CLARE Lady Plicia Baroness Neville, aveva 12 anni. Lui sposato Mrs Hugh de Neville circa 1152, nel Habrough, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1199, nel Grimsby, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Névilleが約1140年に生まれた時，父Gilbert De Nevilleは14歳，母JOHANNA de CLARE Lady Plicia Baroness Nevilleは12歳であった。約1152年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアハブロウでMrs Hugh de Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1199年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアグリムスビーで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Néville(이)가 대략 1140년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert De Neville(은)는 14세였고, 그의 어머니 JOHANNA de CLARE Lady Plicia Baroness Neville(은)는 12세였다. 그는 대략 1152년 영국 링코실르 하브루그h에서 Mrs Hugh de Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1199년 영국 링코실르 그림스비에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Raby, Durham, England: Raby, Durham, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Néville nasceu aproximadamente 1140, seu pai, Gilbert De Neville, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, JOHANNA de CLARE Lady Plicia Baroness Neville, tinha 12 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Hugh de Neville aproximadamente 1152, em Habrough, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1199, em Grimsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Néville родился около 1140 г., его отцу по имени Gilbert De Neville было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали JOHANNA de CLARE Lady Plicia Baroness Neville, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Hugh de Neville около 1152 г. в местности хаброую, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1199 г. в местности гримсби, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh de Néville nació aproximadamente 1140, su papá, Gilbert De Neville, tenía 14 años y su mamá, JOHANNA de CLARE Lady Plicia Baroness Neville, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Mrs Hugh de Neville aproximadamente 1152, en Habrough, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1199, en Grimsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años.
